name: Encode and Decode Strings
description: Design an algorithm to encode a list of strings to a single string and decode it back. The encoded string should be able to handle any characters including delimiters. Implement encode(strs) and decode(s). A common approach: prefix each string with its length followed by a delimiter like '#'.
constraints: 0 <= strs.length <= 200. 0 <= strs[i].length <= 200. strs[i] contains any possible characters.

performance.stress_intent: exercise delimiter-safe round trips on three 200-string near-max payload sets that reject quadratic concatenation and scanning locally
